ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "edt" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather data collection */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "max_dew_point" REAL /* Maximum dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_dew_point" REAL /* Mean dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_dew_point" REAL /* Minimum dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity */,
  "max_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure in inches */,
  "mean_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure in inches */,
  "min_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure in inches */,
  "max_visibility" REAL /* Maximum visibility in miles */,
  "mean_visibility" REAL /* Mean visibility in miles */,
  "min_visibility" REAL /* Minimum visibility in miles */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "mean_wind_speed" REAL /* Mean wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "max_gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum gust speed in miles per hour */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover */,
  "events" TEXT /* Weather events */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data type */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data */,
  "source_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify the integrity of the file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify the integrity of the file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
